programme.title: Ready Jet Go!: Date Night/ Face on the Fritz

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why: Bird Song/ No Need to Shout

programme.title: Dinosaur Train: Dinos A to Z: The Big Idea

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog: The Storm/ Officer Clifford
programme.desc: A lovable, oversized canine, Clifford, emphasizes good citizenship and community.

programme.title: NCIS: One Man's Trash

programme.title: Movie: London Has Fallen

programme.title: Movie: London Has Fallen

programme.desc: While Callen is undercover in the mail room of an office building to investigate an arms dealer, it is taken over by terrorists and Callen becomes a hostage. When the team arrives to help, they discover the entire building is wired with explosives.

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: In the Line of Duty
programme.desc: After U.S. Ambassador Nancy Kelly escapes a terrorist attack at the U.S. consulate in Tunisia, Callen and Sam are sent on a secret and dangerous mission to obtain key evidence from the crime scene. Upon their return, Kelly helps provide information.

programme.title: Dateline: The Other Side of Paradise
programme.desc: A father has fought to bring his daughter's killer to justice for 10- years despite one setback after another.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Fault

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wet

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Branded
programme.desc: Benson and Stabler investigate a brutal attack against a father and learn that he had been branded with a coat hanger. Before long, another victim turns up who is suffering from the same injury.

programme.desc: A jeweler notices that a victim wore an elephant pendant that had been pawned in her shop.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.desc: Police determine that the human remains found in a discarded box belong to one Edna Posey. But to find out whether the man accused of the crime is guilty, investigators turn to insects and the forensic entomologist who can interpret their behavior.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Paintball

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Box of Puppies
programme.desc: A potential adopter wants to give a forever home to a senior dog that has only known life in a kennel. M2 and Kanani are shocked when they find a box of puppies in a field. And, Matt and Earl head to the kitchen to cook up some fresh food for a sick dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Raised in Rescue
programme.desc: Return adopters visit Villalobos to find a dog that will feel at home on their boat. Tania and Mariah head out to rescue a stray that is hiding beneath a shipping container. And parolee Jammall starts to slip up, risking his future at the rescue.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Southern Dogs in the City

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Pitz Carlton
programme.desc: Lizzy and Elise struggle to rescue a dehydrated dog in the blazing heat. An anxious, abandoned dog is moved to a new warehouse for dogs with special needs. And, Tia and the twins help a friend of the rescue find the perfect match.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Flying Blind
programme.desc: Repo Man Ken Cage attempts to nab two high-end yachts in two days. Kevin Lacey's favour for a friend turns into a white-knuckle landing under darkening Texas skies in a plane with no radio on a runway with no lights.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed on Arrival
programme.desc: Mike Kennedy calls in his 'A-Team' in order to snag a Czechoslovakian fighter jet. Ken Cage and Danny Thompson go after a $2-million Citation CJ1 and end up under fire. Kevin Lacey has a run in with an old adversary at the Sundance Air Show.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: The Blonde Bomber
programme.desc: Always one to push the limits, Mike Kennedy attempts his first helicopter heist. Danny puts his partnership with Ken in jeopardy when he steps out on his own to repossess a Cessna 340. Kevin uses his new protégé as bait to snatch a 1941 Stearman biplane.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Wounded Warbird
programme.desc: Kevin Lacey greenlights Heather Sterzick's first solo repo, but she pays the price for her mistakes. Mike Kennedy returns to his old stomping grounds in Puerto Rico to recover a relic from the old family business.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Repo Roulette
programme.desc: Stuntman turned Repo Pilot Mike Kennedy skydives into an airfield to snatch a Dehavilland Twin Otter airplane. Later, Ken Cage and Danny Thompson make a risky two-vehicle snatch from a wealthy playboy.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: No Rescue Repo
programme.desc: Super Repo Man Mike Kennedy boldly risks an emergency landing on a remote Alaskan glacier, while strongman Danny Thompson frees a $1.8-million Lear 31 from its hangar by hand.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: Armed and Airborne
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts track down private jets for repossession. Nick enlists his youngest son to gather photo intelligence, which prove crucial in an assignment riddled with unforeseen obstacles.

programme.title: Airplane Repo: We've Got an Emergency Situation
programme.desc: Nick Popovich and his team of experts hunt down multi-million dollar aircraft from bases throughout the country for repossession. Launching spotters in the field and repo pilots in the cockpit, they risk it all to return luxury planes to their owners.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Melissa M's Story
programme.desc: Melissa has isolated herself at home and lost many friends to avoid feeling the shame of what her food addiction has done to her body. Now, the only way to get her life back is to leave it behind to start a new one with Dr. Now's help in Houston.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Chrystal's Journey
programme.desc: Having her daughters help bathe her is not how Chrystal pictured parenting, but she is so large now that there's no other option. Chrystal wants Dr. Now's help, but she didn't know that bringing her childhood trauma to light would be part of the deal.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Maja and Justin: Where Are They Now?
programme.desc: Maja needs weight-loss surgery so she can lose weight, but Dr. Now won't approve her for surgery if she can't overcome getting dumped by her boyfriend Christian without using food to cope. Justin charts a course to be one of Dr. Now's best patients ever.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Footnotes: Moldy Cheese Feet

programme.desc: Utah has decriminalized polygamy, and Christine toys with the idea of moving back. Meanwhile, coronavirus cases are rising, and Arizona goes into lockdown. Janelle tells Kody to stop coming over, and the whole family grapples with how to handle it all.

programme.desc: It's the month of birthdays in the Brown family, but COVID-19 has disrupted celebrations. With Kody and Meri not communicating, he's surprised to learn that Mariah and Audrey have gone to run the B&B to protect Meri's mom.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Polygamist and Proud!
programme.desc: The Snowdens have a new girlfriend! The Merrifields take drastic measures to bring their Brazilian bombshell fiancee into their family. After their first wife left, the Joneses are ready to seek again. The Clarks have turmoil in their plural kingdom.

programme.title: Seeking Sister Wife: Irreconcilable Differences
programme.desc: Tosha makes a bold confession to her mom. Despite their family's concern, the Merrifields forge ahead with their plans for potential sister wife Roberta. Vanessa and Kaleh clash over their differences. The Snowdens' new girlfriend reveals a secret.

programme.title: Return to Amish: The Panic in Amish Park
programme.desc: The pandemic has forced Jeremiah, Carmela, Ada and Sabrina to come together in Florida. Sabrina prepares for the arrival of her second child, while Jeremiah and Jethro must make peace. Rosanna and Maureen decide to leave their Amish communities.

programme.title: Return to Amish: The Past Isn't the Past

programme.title: Cold Justice: A Mother's Dying Wish
programme.desc: Kelly & Steve return to Hernando County, Florida to help look into the two decade old homicide of a 21-year-old woman who disappeared after a late night party. Years later her body was discovered in an orange grove nearby.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Family Betrayal
programme.desc: Kelly travels to Abbey Abbondandolo’s home state to work with the Idaho Falls PD to help investigate the 2007 homicide of a young mother. When her body was discovered almost 3 years later outside the city, it left a family searching for her killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Ultimatum
programme.desc: Michele and Lloyd Neurauter were devoted to their three daughters, even after divorce. When Michele was found dead in her home, police suspected suicide. Then, they uncovered a deadly betrayal too twisted to be true. Except that it was.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: House Of Secrets

programme.title: Cold Justice: Horror in the Home

programme.title: Cold Justice: Valentine's Day Violence
programme.desc: Kelly and Tonya investigate the 2016 murder of a young Florida mother shot to death in her own home. It'll take cutting-edge forensic technology and old-school interrogation techniques to catch her killer and bring justice to her grieving mother.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Small Town Predator
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny team up to tackle the 1988 murder of a woman whose headless body was found at a cemetery after a night at a local bar. The patrons of the bar could hold the key to identifying her killer and getting her family justice.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mystery on the Mountain
programme.desc: Kelly and Abbey investigate the 2012 disappearance of a young father who traveled to Idaho to attend a family reunion, but never showed up. As the list of suspects grows, can the team uncover the truth behind his vanishing?

programme.title: Cold Justice: Double Life Discovered
programme.desc: Kelly and Johnny investigate one of their oldest cases ever, the brutal 1984 murder of an elderly storeowner known for having a wife with a violent temper. Was his death the robbery gone wrong it appeared to be, or a plot of his wife's design?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Over the Edge
programme.desc: Explore what happened that September night when romance turned to danger. Something went terribly wrong and a woman slipped over the edge of a cliff. Did she fall by accident or was she pushed. It would take almost 20 years to find answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Return to Manitowoc County
programme.desc: It's a gripping case that defies easy answers and Dateline has been following it for more than a decade. At the center, Steven Avery. He and his nephew were convicted of killing Teresa Halbach.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Twin Tragedy
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters are involved in a horrific crash on the island of Maui. Miraculously, one sister survives after their car plunges over the side of a cliff. Was this a tragic accident or something more ominous?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Killer Fetish
programme.desc: First responders are called to the fatal shooting of a 28-year-old woman. Her estranged husband claims their bizarre sex game ended in suicide. Investigators and the victim's family believe this was a cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: A decorated war hero is found in his home, the victim of an apparent drug overdose. Investigators uncover a twisted story of fraud and betrayal that leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Death in a Small Town
programme.desc: An 80-year-old woman is found in her home lying in a pool of blood. Her death is ruled an accident but her family suspects foul play. In a tightknit community where neighbors look out for each other, who would want to hurt a beloved grandmother?

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Dead in the Water
programme.desc: A husband discovers his wife face down in their bathtub. Her death appears to be an accident but questions are raised about how she drowned. Was it a drug overdose? Did she slip and fall? The investigation exposes the disturbing truth.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Young Deadly Love
programme.desc: A young man calls 911 to report his fiancé fatally shot herself in their bed. Her family insists she would never take her own life. The investigation drags on for years until an unexpected development leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: The Missing Bullet
programme.desc: A man discovers the body of his fiancé with an apparent self-inflicted gunshot wound. Her death is ruled a suicide but authorities are puzzled when they can't find the fatal bullet. The discovery of the missing bullet turns the case upside down.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Blind Justice
programme.desc: For investigators, motive can be the hardest thing to find. This crime took place in Florida but detectives didn't discover a motive for murder until they looked into a tropical island thousands of miles away, where a festering grudge was born.

programme.title: Movie: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: Po must teach Kung Fu to a small village of pandas in order to defeat a supernatural villain.

programme.title: Movie: How to Train Your Dragon: The Hidden World
programme.desc: Viking Hiccup and his dragon's happy lives are disrupted when they meet a female Night Fury that's followed closely by an army determined to enslave all dragons. Hiccup's clan and their dragons set sail to find the safety of a legendary dragon utopia.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: The Hawkening: Look Who's Hawking Now
programme.desc: Bob and Louise are riding high, hosting an exclusive screening of a Hawk and Chick movie at the restaurant, until the actor who plays Hawk throws a wrench into the works, for his own mysterious reasons.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Land of the Loft
programme.desc: Bob and Linda challenge themselves and attend a loft party on a stormy night, while the kids challenge their babysitter, Jen, and face the storm in an ice cream truck.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Now We're Not Cooking With Gas
programme.desc: Bob is determined to do whatever it takes to cook a rare, heritage turkey after the gas goes out on Thanksgiving.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: All That Gene
programme.desc: Gene auditions for a small role in a local theater production, but things backfire when he discovers that Linda actually bargained with the director to get Gene the part.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Have Yourself a Maily Linda Christmas
programme.desc: Linda works a temp job at the post office to make extra money for the holidays. But when an important package goes undelivered, Linda breaks protocol and takes it upon herself to save the day.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Drumforgiven
programme.desc: Gene gets kicked out of the Ocean Avenue Hifi Emporium, but Louise takes matters into her own hands to defend Gene's honour.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Mac Finds His Pride
programme.desc: Frank tries to recruit Mac for the gang’s kickass float for the Gay Pride Parade. It dawns on Frank that Mac will never be secure with his sexual identity unless he comes out to his father.

programme.desc: An old classmate tells Charlie that he's the father of her child. Mac attends an anti-abortion rally in hopes of scoring with a woman who's pro-life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mission to a Comet
programme.desc: The Rosetta mission was a ground-breaking expedition to land on a comet. Learn what the journey discovered and how these objects helped create life on Earth.

programme.title: Space's Deepest Secrets: Mystery of the Dead Planets
programme.desc: Astronomers are laying the groundwork to locate a new planet for the human race to inhabit, and the more alien worlds they discover and encounter, the more they unmask the mysterious and truly destructive nature of the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Mission to a Comet
programme.desc: The Rosetta mission was a ground-breaking expedition to land on a comet. Learn what the journey discovered and how these objects helped create life on Earth.

programme.desc: Astronomers are laying the groundwork to locate a new planet for the human race to inhabit, and the more alien worlds they discover and encounter, the more they unmask the mysterious and truly destructive nature of the cosmos.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: When NASA Met Jupiter
programme.desc: NASA's Juno spacecraft is part of a cutting-edge mission to explore the mysteries of Jupiter. As this mighty probe is pummeled with deadly radiation, it gathers new data that could change everything we know about the solar system's biggest planet.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Raiders of the Holy Lance
programme.desc: A heavily armored force takes over one of Syria's most ancient archaeology sites, prompting fears that its relics are being stolen. Tanks appear to be facing off in Antarctica next to an unworldly object. A water reservoir in LA suddenly turns black.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Did We Find Flight 370?
programme.desc: Investigators find a new clue about the missing Malaysia Airlines flight that disappeared in 2014. An astronaut spots something strange in the Sahara Desert. A mysterious orange sludge invades a remote village in Alaska.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Curse of Merlin
programme.desc: The myth of Merlin is associated with an arrangement of stones in northern France, and satellite images might finally explain this ancient riddle. Investigators uncover something mysterious buried beneath the Gulf of Mexico. An island suddenly appears.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Island of Alien Ooze
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a volcanic island that suddenly appears in the Pacific Ocean, and when NASA scientists arrive to investigate, they are baffled to find its home to a primordial slime and zombie creatures with origins in outer space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: CIA Killer Monks
programme.desc: Something strange in the Himalayas could be evidence of a top-secret CIA program to turn monks into killer agents, and cutting-edge science helps experts investigate the truth behind this mysterious anomaly.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of Genghis Khan
programme.desc: A strange structure is discovered in the Gobi Desert, and experts investigate if this mysterious site could reveal the whereabouts of lost treasure, which might change everything we know about Genghis Khan and the Mongol warriors who once lived here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Amazon's Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: When satellites spot anomalies in the unexplored Amazonian jungle, experts wonder if they've discovered relics of a lost civilization. An on-the-ground investigation reveals a dark truth that's more sinister than ever imagined.

programme.title: See No Evil: Captured on Camera
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, a 22-year-old nursing assistant vanishes. When police check the local CCTV footage, they discover that Carlesha Freeland-Gaither was violently abducted right on camera.

programme.title: See No Evil: Stalking Carl
programme.desc: August 18, 2015. 36-year-old Carl Starke is shot dead in cold blood close to his home in St. Augustine, Florida. There are no witnesses, but neighbours did hear shots. Armed with a likely time of death, police turn to CCTV to help hunt his killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: On October 1st, 2009, 37-year-old Natasha Cournoyer disappears without a trace in Laval, Canada. As her friends and family struggle for answers, detectives must follow a stone-cold trail to uncover her final footsteps caught on surveillance cameras.

programme.title: See No Evil: It Came Back
programme.desc: When a young mother of two is found brutally murdered at home, suspicion falls on her friends. Detectives zero in on multiple suspects but as each one tells a different story; they don't know who to trust. Surveillance footage may reveal the truth.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Crowd
programme.desc: What starts as a calm night at the American Legion in Evansville, Indiana, quickly takes a turn when Anthony Blaylock is shot dead. But when detectives obtain video surveillance showing who is responsible, they stop at nothing to find his killer.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: This Guy's Getting Paranoid
programme.desc: Roaa Al-Dhanoon has disappeared. What begins as a missing persons case, takes a disturbing turn by someone who is closest to her. Now, detectives must unravel a complex web of deceit that continues to strike fear throughout the devastated community.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: The Girl in the Crowd
programme.desc: What starts as a calm night at the American Legion in Evansville, Indiana, quickly takes a turn when Anthony Blaylock is shot dead. But when detectives obtain video surveillance showing who is responsible, they stop at nothing to find his killer.

programme.title: The Devil Speaks: Message From the Grave
programme.desc: Michelle Despinasse is shot inside her own home in Nanuet, New York. She is rushed to hospital but succumbs to her injuries. Investigators discover that in her final moments, Michelle made a secret recording that will reveal her killer's identity.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Graveyard Shift
programme.desc: On October 1st, 2009, 37-year-old Natasha Cournoyer disappears without a trace in Laval, Canada. As her friends and family struggle for answers, detectives must follow a stone-cold trail to uncover her final footsteps caught on surveillance cameras.

programme.title: The 1980s: The Deadliest Decade: The Libertyville Horror
programme.desc: This infamous house in Old Louisville, Kentucky has dark secrets lurking within its walls.

programme.title: The 1990s: The Deadliest Decade: Don't Ask Don't Tell
programme.desc: In 1992, Allen Schindler, a young American sailor, is beaten to death in Japan. Ten days later, his tattered body returns home, with little information from the Navy. His mother goes on a desperate quest to learn who's behind her son's vicious murder.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: The Nuwaubian Nation of Moors
programme.desc: The followers of cult leader Dwight York come from all walks of life. Ruby joins the Nuwaubian Nation when looking for answers to life's big questions while Niki is brought in as a child. Both become disillusioned as they learn the truth about York.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Word of Life
programme.desc: The Word of Life Church, starts as a small bible study group led by Pastor Jerry Irwin. After his death, his daughter Tiffanie gains control and makes life hell for the church followers, leading to the brutal death of a teenaged boy.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Homicide on the Rails
programme.desc: A spring break adventure turns deadly when a college student infiltrates a community of train hoppers.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Going Postal
programme.desc: When US postal worker Kim accepts a ride to the Orange County fair from a quiet co-worker, she has no idea that she will become the center of a terrifying campaign of stalking, harassment, and obsession.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Blood in the Barn
programme.desc: Small-town gal Frankie Cochran thinks she's found the one in handsome David Gehrard. But as his behavior brings rising cause for concern, Frankie wonders if a secret from his past might hold more meaning than she first thought.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Campus Tragedy
programme.desc: John Walsh spotlights freshman who allegedly introduces a knife to a fistfight that claims a star college student's life. Later, Callahan Walsh looks for Thayne Smika, who, police believe, shoots his roommate in cold blood over back rent.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Serial Confessions
programme.desc: Watch and hear the shocking confession of a real estate agent turned serial killer and a stunning rescue video of a woman held hostage in a shipping container.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Golden State Killer
programme.desc: In the 1970s a serial rapist is on the loose in northern California. And just as his reign of terror over the community wanes, police discover he isn't just a serial rapist, he's a serial murderer and he's been killing people all over California.

programme.title: A Time to Kill: Murder on His Mind
programme.desc: A young Iowa man is shot dead while he sleeps peacefully next to his fiancée. Investigators wonder how she remained unharmed, and suspicion quickly swirls around her and two of her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: Welcome to Murdertown: Murder in Macks Creek
programme.desc: Trudy Darby is murdered in Mack's Creek, MO. When two more local women go missing police fear a serial killer. Silence reigns over the town until a call out of the blue reveals the killers are uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Disappeared: Born This Way
programme.desc: When Sage Smith, a transgender teen in Charlottesville, Virginia goes missing, police identify a suspect. But the investigation turns up evidence that forces detectives to look closer into Sage's inner circle to see if there are answers.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Yankees, Rebels and World War II
programme.desc: World War II myths are explored. Forgotten truths of America's Civil War are examined.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Science or Sci-Fi?
programme.desc: The science in our nation's history is examined. Explore the myths that infect America's medical history and learn the facts behind America's nuclear age.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Bonus Round: Monumental Realities
programme.desc: The myths behind some of history's most defining moments are uncovered, as well as revealing facts behind America's space explorations.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam

programme.title: Combat Countdown: Ultimate Firepower

programme.desc: In every theatre of war, long-range weaponry gives you the ability to reach out and touch your opponent while staying out of harm's way. It's a critical edge that can be the difference between victory and defeat.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Hollywood vs. History
programme.desc: The story of the Old West as it was and as it was portrayed by the giants of cinema. Legendary lawmen like Wyatt Earp and 'Wild Bill' Hickok, infamous outlaws like Jesse James and Billy the Kid, and epic showdowns like the Gunfight at the OK Corral.

programme.title: The Cowboy: Movies That Shaped America's Myth
programme.desc: Celebrating the icons and legends of the American West as immortalized by Hollywood. From the great stars like Clint Eastwood, John Wayne, and Steve McQueen, to the great directors like John Ford, Sergio Leone, and Sam Peckinpah.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Blood Treasure
programme.desc: Conflicts between Nazi Germany and the Soviet Union cost millions of lives. The war also led to two of the most infamous and mysterious treasure thefts ever. The team searches for the Amber Room and the missing Berlin treasure hoard.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: Stealing Italy
programme.desc: The team is on the trail of two iconic treasures: $1.5 billion worth of gold looted from the Bank of Italy and missing art from the great museums of Florence.

programme.title: Hunting Nazi Treasure: City of Loot
programme.desc: The team investigates the systematic looting of Paris during four years of Nazi occupation and tracks missing treasures to Berlin and Switzerland.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.desc: The ability to deploy precision strike weapons has completely changed the nature of war. Advances in weapon technology have made it possible to send a missile through a specific window of a building from a thousand miles away.

programme.desc: Trace the family trees of the greatest fighting vehicles and armoured personnel carriers in history.

programme.desc: Michael and Ashley have their work cut out for them while restoring a dilapidated 1914 fixer-upper. They create a light-filled breakfast nook and repurpose a vintage wooden sign to transform a quaint pink corner house.

programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.desc: Brett restores a 1930s two-story Spanish Colonial farmhouse in Fontana, California. He learns the rich history of the home which then guides his design plan for the house exterior, entryway, living room and kitchen.

programme.desc: Brett discovers a unique neighborhood of 1920's era English Cottages.

programme.title: Restored: 1901 Neoclassical Victorian
programme.desc: Brett helps an engaged couple restore their Victorian home, including a new kitchen and bathroom before their big wedding day. Brett begins work on the kitchen, removing additions and wallpaper.

programme.title: Restored: 1927 Arts and Crafts Bungalow
programme.desc: A daughter and mother call on Brett to restore a 1927 arts and crafts house that's lost some character over the years. While restoring the home, Brett unexpectedly discovers a hidden masterpiece.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Eyesore to Ultimate Pool Party Paradise
programme.desc: A family that loves to entertain relocates from Chicago to Nashville. They are in desperate need of a pool for the hot summer days. However, their backyard is not functional for the kids, so Kelly, Christian and Cameron work to transform the space.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Living La Vida Lakeside
programme.desc: After 14 years of dreaming, a Lake Jackson, Texas, family is finally building their custom home on a piece of land around Pecan Lake. Located on a peninsula, the backyard leaves the ideal space to build a one-of-a-kind vanishing edge pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Flawed to Flawless
programme.desc: A Franklin, TN, couple enlists the Pool Kings to build their dream pool in their very challenging backyard.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Overgrown to Over the Top
programme.desc: A Franklin, Tennessee, family has been living with an unfinished pool for over two years and is in desperate need of a pool rescue. The Pool Kings step in to transform this backyard from a state of chaos to something beyond their wildest dreams.

programme.title: Pool Kings: I'm on Vacation Already
programme.desc: Now that the interior of their dream house is finished, a family of five asks the Pool Kings to transform their neglected backyard. They want a relaxing multi-level private resort with a waterfall grotto, huge spa, swim-up bar and outdoor living room.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Texas Staycation Paradise
programme.desc: A young family wants to build a 'refined rustic' staycation paradise in their Austin, Texas backyard. Mike and Jim answer the call by building their dream oasis with waterfalls, LED lights, a swim-up bar and a barbecue cabana as the finishing touch.

programme.title: Pool Kings: My Last Pool Was An Iron Tub
programme.desc: A ranch family in Palm Desert, CA, is finally ready to build the desert oasis they've been dreaming of for 20 years. Their backyard paradise includes a complex of waterfalls, a natural boulder spillway, a hidden waterslide, and outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Welcome to Fire Island
programme.desc: A North Carolina family is eager to finally have their first pool. Their expansive backyard allows for an over-the-top, resort-style pool, so the crew take on an extensive build with a 30-foot waterfall, lazy river and a sunken fire pit island.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Super Smoked and Savory
programme.desc: In Queens, New York, Michael Symon dives into the juiciest, meatiest, triple-stacked burger with beef, lamb and turkey. Some of the most authentic Mexican lamb barbacoa this side of the border is found in Houston, Texas.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon starts at the ultimate custom burger bar in Providence, Rhode Island, where he chooses from over 400,000 topping combinations to create his own meaty masterpiece.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Supersized
programme.desc: On this episode, Noah's safe word is more, as he takes it to the limit with seven of the most belly-busting carnival eats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Heat Is On
programme.desc: Hot, hot, hot carnival treats are the stars of this episode. From pleasingly piquant pretzels in California, to sweet and fiery desserts in New York, Noah gets up the courage to sample seven of the spiciest midway munchies from coast to coast.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Close Encounters Of The Food Kind
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is hot on the trail of some otherworldly carnival eats at the UFO Festival in Roswell.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Funnel Cakes
programme.desc: Noah Cappe drops in on central California's Placer County Fair, the home of some one-of-a-kind fair foods.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Eggs Men
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets the royal treatment with "ye olde eats" at the Hoggetown Medieval Faire in Gainesville, Fla. Meat is all over the menu, and Noah goes wild for the smoked bison burger and the wild boar leg.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Planet of the Dates
programme.desc: Noah Cappe is ready for 1,001 nights of fun at the Arabian Nights-themed Riverside County Fair and National Date Festival in Indio, Calif. He makes a date with a dangerous burger and enjoys a sweet mashup with the churro dog.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Killer Combos
programme.desc: Roger Mooking explores the foods that are just too good together to be kept apart, showcasing 15 culinary combinations that make mouths water and hearts race. From an extraordinary take on chicken and waffles to a handmade root beer float.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Lay it on Thick
programme.desc: From lobster smothered in melted Monterey Jack cheese to s'mores with gooey handmade marshmallows drenched in chocolate, this coast-to-coast tour finds the most indulgent, thickly coated culinary creations ever made.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Sweet Home Chicago
programme.desc: From classic Chicago dogs at Wrigley Field and the South Side's most delicious deep dish, to an old school Jewish deli and gourmet burgers underground, the Windy City's best eats are highlighted.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Surf And Turf
programme.desc: Roger Mooking checks out the best surf-and-turf dishes in restaurants across America. He joins chefs to learn how to put amazing combinations together including the classic lobster tail and steak, clam and bacon pizza, and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Backyard BBQ Blowouts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking drops in at two backyard cookouts where the smoke is thick and the fires are hot. He helps guest chef Jeremy Conner prepare a fish roast at renowned bed and breakfast Maison Madeleine in Breaux Bridge, L.A.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lighting Up Louisiana
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Louisiana, where smoked meat makes an appearance in many classic Cajun dishes. He meets Chef Nathanial Zimet, who serves North Carolina-style smoked whole hog in po' boy sandwiches at Bourree in New Orleans.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: From Cornfields to Canada
programme.desc: Noah Cappe kicks things off in Polk County, Minnesota, where he goes local with the North Woods sandwich and Barbe-chos. Then it’s across the border to the Red River Exhibition to experience a Canadian classic, prairie poutine.

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Snack Pact/ The Horror-Scope
programme.desc: The family finds a tamale cart and tries to keep it secret from Abuela. And, Ronnie Anne doesn't believe in an astrological prediction until it comes true.

programme.title: The Loud House: No Such Luck/ Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: The Loud House: Fool's Paradise/ Job Insecurity
programme.desc: With prankster Luan away at camp for April Fool's Day, the Louds think they should be safe. The kids discover Dad isn't at his old job anymore and worry it might be their fault.

programme.title: The Loud House: Lincoln Loud: Girl Guru/ Come Sale Away
programme.desc: For a class assignment, Lincoln and Clyde must start a business, so they decide to sell Lincoln's girl expertise. It's time for the Loud family annual garage sale, and every kid is determined to out-sell the others.

programme.title: The Loud House: Baby Steps/ Brawl in the Family
programme.desc: When Clyde thinks his parents are having another baby he goes to Lincoln for help on how to be a great big brother. When Lori and Leni both buy the same dress, a fight breaks out leading to Defcon five in the Loud house.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bummer Vacation/ Wigstruck
programme.desc: SpongeBob has never taken a vacation, so Krabs makes his #1 employee take the day off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea In Her Dome/ Donut Of Shame/ The Krusty Plate
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick try to help Sandy rid her Tree Dome of fleas. Patrick accidentally takes a donut and is wracked with guilt. SpongeBob battles a persistent speck of food that is on a plate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Thing/ Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: When Squidward is totally covered in mud, leaves and gunk, the residents of Bikini Bottom think he's some sort of monster coming to terrorize the town. Later, Spongebob gets a brand new magic kit and, after practicing all day, tries to show off.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Blackened Sponge/ Mermaidman vs. Spongebob
programme.desc: SpongeBob punches himself in the face, but tells everyone that he fought off a thug.

programme.title: It's Pony: Dad's Speech/ School Dance
programme.desc: Annie tries to help Dad work through his stage fright by encouraging him to be more like Pony. Everyone is dreading the Valentine's school dance, so Annie and Pony try to get it cancelled.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Born to Be Wild/ Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Spongebob must protect the town from a biker gang; new smoothies are the talk of the town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West
programme.desc: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever
programme.desc: Spongebob decides he is going to have the best day ever.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Original Fry Cook/ Night Light
programme.desc: SpongeBob is in awe of Mr. Krab's former chef; SpongeBob is scared of the boogeyman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Not Normal/ Gone
programme.desc: SpongeBob makes it his mission to become completely normal, and he begins to lose all his spongey-ness. SpongeBob wakes up one morning to find that everyone in Bikini Bottom is gone, even Gary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Patty Gadget/ Money Talks
programme.desc: SpongeBob competes against a patty-making machine; Mr. Krabs' money tells him to spend it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Penny Foolish/ Nautical Novice

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: Angry with how the Plantar farm is being run, Sprig decides to overthrow Hop Pop. Anne is going to give Polly some long overdue girl time, whether Polly wants it or not.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Present Tense/ Hurt Bike
programme.desc: Cricket struggles to get the best birthday present for his best friend, Remy. After almost getting in a dirt bike accident, Cricket decides to live his life in shelter.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Shark Objects / Dream Weaver
programme.desc: When Greens try to spend an eventful day at the beach, Cricket tries to prank the beach-goers; Cricket discovers he can influence the family's dreams to disastrous real-life results.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.desc: Cricket is mistaken for a pop star and decides to exploit the situation for all the perks of fame.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Stuck
programme.desc: When Herman tries to do a prank on his own, he ends up trapped inside the school's trophy case. Now it's up to the rest of the gang to get him out without getting caught.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Whatever Gets You Through the Night
programme.desc: Herman has been invited to his first ever sleepover, but he is terrified because sometimes he does crazy things in his sleep.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Baby Please
programme.desc: Bailey catches Herman reading her diary and decides to get payback by pranking him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Fish You Were Here
programme.desc: Bailey is upset when she is the only one of her classmates not invited to a birthday party.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: School Clubbing
programme.desc: The gang signs up for after school clubs. Bailey joins the 'friends of animals club,' Dusty the 'TV club,' Herman the 'wrestling club' and Chance the 'journalism club.'

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Grandma's Here to Stay
programme.desc: Dusty is stressed when his Grandma moves into his house and is now sharing a room with him.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dino Safari VR
programme.desc: Chance, Herman and Dusty are mesmerized by a new dinosaur virtual reality game which inspires a new set of pranks. Bailey disguises as a mind-melting robot from the future. An unsuspecting camp counselor believe he's discovered a spaceship in the woods.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Big Mother is Watching
programme.desc: The kids are outraged to learn that a tracking app has been installed on all of their phones.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Dear Me
programme.desc: The kids have to write letters to themselves 20 years in the future. Meanwhile, the gang pulls off hilarious pranks that include a wild skunk scaring a babysitter, and a target who believes a 3-D printer can print real food.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Teachers Break Their Promises
programme.desc: When the students learn their much-anticipated class trip has been cancelled due to budgetary reasons, they devise a plan to fight back. Meanwhile, Uncle Will, Dusty, Chance, and Herman turn the mall upside down to prank a security guard.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: A Very Vlad Joke
programme.desc: The team tries to teach Bailey's new friend Vlad the art of pulling off a great practical joke, just in time for them to pull off an epic prank involving a teacher's aide, aliens and the military.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Anne Comes to School
programme.desc: The latest lough-out-loud pranks include the team staging a pet adoption with a wild stuffed puppy and a fake 'Bam-O!' cereal commercial that leaves an actor rethinking his career.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: The Earth Gets Mooned
programme.desc: The gang takes part in an annual science competition at school, but they have trouble with their project partners.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Walk the Prank: K.C. Undercover Edition
programme.desc: The gang is undercover to take down a rival prank channel that is stealing ideas from them. Pranks feature Zendaya, Veronica and Kamil from the cast of K.C. Undercover.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: No Debating Bailey
programme.desc: When Drama Drew transfers schools, Ms. Spencer hunts for a replacement debater to face off against him at upcoming the regional championships.

programme.title: Walk the Prank: Lord of the Gummmy Worms
programme.desc: When the kids are stranded alone in the woods on a school camping trip, Bailey and Chance split into rival groups over their only supply of food: Gummy Worms.

programme.title: Hall of Flame: Top 100 Roast Moments: Part Four

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper

programme.desc: Police found an abandoned car on the highway and assumed the driver had been the victim of a car-jacking. When they find the victim's body, unusual marks on her body lead to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ghost in the Machine
programme.desc: In May of 1999, a minister's wife died in the bathtub from being unconscious.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Purr-fect Match
programme.desc: Examine intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Stake-Out
programme.desc: When a banker's wife is kidnapped, officers scour the bank, and records for clues. They soon realize how much evidence can be found around a normal office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Walking Terror
programme.desc: A neighbour witnesses a man stab and drown his wife. When the man is questioned by police, he remembers nothing, and is shocked at his own actions. The jury must decide if he is a murderer, or suffering from a sleep disorder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Charged Up
programme.desc: Philadelphia authorities use an anonymous letter to locate a perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking the Mold
programme.desc: A family realizes that their health problems could be related to an uninvited 'guest.'

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar

programme.desc: The giant, toppling piles of clutter are more dangerous to Jessica, who is a little person, who in tandem with her mother has filled her entire home with stuff.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Nikki's Story
programme.desc: Lifelong secret eater Nikki finds her life and career as a costume designer threatened by immobility as her weight climbs to 650 pounds. In urgent need of drastic weight loss, she undergoes gastric bypass and confronts the emotional causes for her eating.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Supersized: Tammy's Journey

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Gina's Story

programme.desc: Julie and Todd decide to celebrate their wedding anniversary by throwing a charity event to raise money for breast cancer. When someone mixes up the dates, however, it’s a mad scramble to try to pull off the biggest party of the year.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: My Chrisley Valentine

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Dollars and Sense
programme.desc: Savannah has a rose coloured view of what her spending habits will look like when she goes off to college.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Pioneering Ordeal
programme.desc: Chef Alex Guarnaschelli links up with the Pioneer Woman, Ree Drummond, to orchestrate a loss. Two southern gentlemen, Atlanta's Jamarium Banks and Vince Giancarlo from Charlotte, North Carolina won't be playing nice as they try to beat Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Roasting on an Open Fire
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli and magician Penn Jillette are hoping for a Christmas miracle, beating Bobby Flay. Adil Fawzi and Ariane Duarte faceoff in the hopes of receiving the best gift of all, a win over Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Who's Got This in the Bag?
programme.desc: It's personal for Maine restaurateur Mark Gaier, who's here to redeem his partner's prior loss to Bobby Flay, but chef and caterer Christopher Covelli isn't going down without a fight.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Homeland
programme.desc: Onions get chopped and garlic gets smashed when Vietnamese-born Thoa Nguyen does battle with high-end chef Jason Hippen. Chefs Anne Burrell and Scott Conant decide who has the cuisine to reign supreme.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Funny or Fried
programme.desc: Food Network's Alton Brown and Amanda Freitag ensure there's no funny business when Napa Valley's Gregory Wiener and comedian Daphne Brogdon compete to boo Bobby Flay out of his kitchen.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Making Headlines
programme.desc: Dylan Dreyer of "The Today Show" is paired up with "Chopped's" Scott Conant against their friend and challenger Bobby Flay. An island battle is fought between Jamaican chef Patrick Simpson and Hawaiian chef Alvin Savella.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Berry Crazy Night
programme.desc: Food Network's Eddie Jackson and Anne Burrell hope to trip up Bobby Flay with some stellar competition. Things come down to the wire between chefs Nokee Bucayu and Jay Reifel, leaving Anne, Eddie and Bobby all on the edge of their seats.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Eye Of The Tiger
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli and Eddie Jackson keep an eagle eye on Nashville chef Dale Levitski and Indian-born Manish Tyagi. The competitors bring their best as they vie for the chance to sink their claws into Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible: Destination, Hawk Springs
programme.desc: Robert Irvine ventures to The Emporium in the small town of Hawk Springs, WY, where owner Dennis is struggling to lead his staff and attract customers. If Robert can't make him change his ways, Dennis' daughter might walk away from the business forever.

programme.title: Dinner: Impossible: Tropic Lightning
programme.desc: Hawaii's 25th Infantry Division enlists Robert Irvine to prepare a 5-star dinner for 60 soldiers to celebrate their 79th anniversary. Using only a mobile army field kitchen and meal rations, Robert must create a high-end dinner in just seven hours.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Feeling Bleu
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli and Bobby Moynihan team up and beating Bobby is no joking matter. They bring in Marcellus Coleman and Lionel Haeberle to slay the Flay.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Off to the Races
programme.desc: Chef Josh Capon and sports reporter Carolyn Manno team up to make sure Bobby Flay doesn't try for a trick play. Haitian chef Jouvens Jean takes on Francophile and Seattle restaurateur Bruce Naftaly to beat Bobby at his own game.

programme.title: Summer House: Let the Good Times Roll

programme.title: Summer House: The Sandwich Between Us
programme.desc: While the cold war between Luke and Hannah shows no signs of warming, Lindsay wonders if she is actually the priority in her relationship with Stephen. The housemates plan a nice family dinner, but chaos ensues.

programme.title: Summer House: Trash Talk
programme.desc: With the weekend finally upon them, the crew decides to let loose in an all-out mullet extravaganza. The debauchery continues when they hit the beach for the first time this summer. Hannah and Luke reconcile.

programme.title: Summer House: Best Frenemies
programme.desc: Luke thinks a flirtatious flower delivery will get his relationship with Ciara back on track, only to find himself deeper in the friendzone. Stephen attempts to cheer Lindsay up with a romantic birthday dinner that completely backfires.

programme.title: Summer House: Power-Pointless
programme.desc: Always looking for an opportunity to send it, Kyle is enraged to find his housemates have more laid back plans for their Saturday night than he’d prefer. The teacher becomes the student when Lindsay finally receives a grand gesture from Stephen.

programme.title: Summer House: Medium at Large

programme.title: Summer House: Crawl Me Maybe

programme.title: Summer House: Should I Stay or Should I Go?
programme.desc: A fun house pub crawl devolves into a serious conflict between the boys, causing Luke to leave the house, possibly for good. Lindsay's pregnancy test result has her wondering if she made a mistake when she broke up with Stephen.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Beyond Nazca
programme.desc: Investigating if Nazca have been a mining operation for advanced beings in the distant past.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The New Evidence

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: The Pharaohs' Curse

programme.desc: Creepy Connie returns with a sidekick, Mackenzie. The two play a cat and mouse game as they vie for Luke's affection.

programme.title: Movie: Zombies 2
programme.desc: A cheerleader and a football players are preparing to go off to their prom. They don't realize that they are facing danger, in the form of teenage werewolves that threaten to derail their plans for the perfect night.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Mages and Mazes/ Okay Karaoke
programme.desc: The kids play a role-playing game at Remy's but his rules lead to conflict. The Greens go out for karaoke, but Tilly struggles to express her true self through song.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Raven's Home: Remix
programme.desc: Booker sets out to land the starring role in the school's musical. Raven encourages him, however he needs Tess' help as the part involves basketball and rap, but he refuses her help because she's a girl.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Gabriella's Fella/ Cheap Show
programme.desc: When Cricket's crush returns, Remy takes the opportunity to help Cricket get to know her.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Green Mirror/ Cricket's Tickets

programme.title: Bunk'd: Lou's Still the Boss but Now There's a Ross
programme.desc: Camp director Lou, counselors Ava and Noah and campers Destiny, Matteo and Finn are delighted when Emma, fresh from her glamorous career as a fashion designer in Milan, pays a surprise visit to Camp Kikiwaka.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Rise of the Machine
programme.desc: Noah and Ava face a new challenge when they take over the 'PeeWeeWaka' day camp program for younger campers. Meanwhile, Destiny and Finn express very different styles when they co-host the camp radio news show.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: How Sydney Got Her Phone Back
programme.desc: When a cell phone ban policy during school hours goes up for a vote, Sydney is sure her dad, who's on the Parent School Committee, will vote against it.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Baking Bad
programme.desc: Booker, Nia and Tess discover a baking blogger is passing Nia's photo off as their own social media avatar while writing mean-spirited reviews. The kids try to unmask the culprit before Nia's real-life reputation is jeopardized.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Big Little Surprise

programme.title: Jessie: Take the A-Train ... I Think?

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Rate-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv, Maddie and their friends confront a fellow schoolmate who has been giving them numeric ratings based on looks.

programme.title: Austin & Ally: Backups and Breakups
programme.desc: Trish's new boyfriend auditions for a role as Austin's backup dancer, and she decides to keep their relationship a secret so as not to influence Team Austin's decision. However, Ally sees him flirting with another girl and has to decide what to do.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy’s next delivery, an egg, gets mixed up with the eggs for the Annual Easter Egg Hunt! Pip braves the desert heat with Freddy to deliver a baby camel to nomad parents!

programme.desc: When Mia and Lucky can't get along, Pip and Freddy try to broker the peace with a pajama party! Freddy learns that twin zebras are unique in their own ways.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly search for the perfect pair of cowboy boots so Bob can go line dancing during his Texas road trip. Then, when Bob discovers the clock tower in a small town he's visiting is broken, the pugs go on a mission to fix it.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: What to Expect When You're Egg-specting/ Ruffin' It
programme.desc: While in New Zealand, the pugs try to return a large egg before it hatches. When Chloe and Keia lose a special canoe paddle, the pups embark on a wilderness adventure to find it.

programme.title: Dateline: Unforgettable: The Client
programme.desc: Andrea Canning will never forget this story because of the number of twists and turns. Beverly Carter was a top-selling realtor who went missing after showing a house. When her friends received mysterious text messages, they knew something was wrong.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Swept Away
programme.desc: A young man from small town Indiana heads to Japan where he falls for a beautiful woman from a land nearly as far away. Then, one of the biggest natural disasters in history hits.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Knock at the Door
programme.desc: Tara Ord was a beautiful young woman with big dreams. Then suddenly she vanished. With little evidence to go on, it would take years for determined cold case detectives to uncover the long buried clue that blew this case wide open.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Betrayal
programme.desc: Lisa and Kevin Knoefel seemed like the perfect couple. They were busy raising three children, and then welcomed a foster child too. When Sabrina admitted to killing Lisa, no one could understand why. This case was about to get very complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson always put her kids first. When she vanished without a word, her loved ones were frantic. Police discovered dark secrets in Sandi's marriage and several men in her life. Which one of them had something to hide?

programme.title: Killer Motive: Murder in the Parking Lot
programme.desc: Police search for an odd-looking gunman seen fleeing after shooting a young mom to death, and uncover a suspect who's not what they expect—with a motive that’s impossible to comprehend.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Over the Edge
programme.desc: Explore what happened that September night when romance turned to danger. Something went terribly wrong and a woman slipped over the edge of a cliff. Did she fall by accident or was she pushed. It would take almost 20 years to find answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Return to Manitowoc County
programme.desc: It's a gripping case that defies easy answers and Dateline has been following it for more than a decade. At the center, Steven Avery. He and his nephew were convicted of killing Teresa Halbach.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Friend Left Behind
programme.desc: A party in the woods of a Pennsylvania coal mining town takes a chilling turn when someone goes missing. Investigators have more questions than answers and when the summer thaw brings a shocking discovery, it's clear someone is hiding a deadly truth.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Girl in the Grave
programme.desc: A hike in the woods of the Hollywood Hills takes a terrifying turn when a dog digs up a female foot. As panic spreads through a Southern California community a family fears for its own safety and investigators will stop at nothing to catch a killer.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Deadly Premonition
programme.desc: Life looks bright for a new college graduate. But when her beloved car is found abandoned, investigators race to find the missing girl. Weeks later, a psychic comes forward delivering unforeseen answers and an appalling twist no one sees coming.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: First Love, Last Breath

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the House: Don't Unlock the Freezer
programme.desc: Examine true-crime stories of victims found buried in the most unsuspecting of places.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Dead of Night

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer: A Genius Murder

programme.title: What on Earth?: Bermuda Triangle of Space

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War

programme.desc: When a close encounter with an enraged ape-like creature is caught on camera, experts investigate if it's evidence of a once-extinct Neanderthal specimen engineered by a nearby experimental research facility.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of Satan's Crown
programme.desc: A bizarre explosion is captured that morphs into a sinister black ring of smoke above a California football stadium; experts investigate and uncover an underground network of Satanists with connections to a string of modern-day terrorist plots.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gate to the Viking Gods
programme.desc: New evidence reveals dozens of bizarre circular structures buried in the remote hills of Norway. An expert investigation uncovers a mysterious burial ground that may have been a portal to the Viking spiritual realm.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Amazon Nazis
programme.desc: When investigators spot strange anomalies in the Amazon jungle, the discovery stokes rumors of a long-lost Nazi base in the Americas; experts follow the evidence to a grisly find, revealing a secret history of nuclear secrets and a notorious dictator.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Omen of Satan's Crown
programme.desc: A bizarre explosion is captured that morphs into a sinister black ring of smoke above a California football stadium; experts investigate and uncover an underground network of Satanists with connections to a string of modern-day terrorist plots.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gate to the Viking Gods
programme.desc: New evidence reveals dozens of bizarre circular structures buried in the remote hills of Norway. An expert investigation uncovers a mysterious burial ground that may have been a portal to the Viking spiritual realm.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Amazon Nazis
programme.desc: When investigators spot strange anomalies in the Amazon jungle, the discovery stokes rumors of a long-lost Nazi base in the Americas; experts follow the evidence to a grisly find, revealing a secret history of nuclear secrets and a notorious dictator.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Neanderthal Bigfoot Attack
programme.desc: When a close encounter with an enraged ape-like creature is caught on camera, experts investigate if it's evidence of a once-extinct Neanderthal specimen engineered by a nearby experimental research facility.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Washington, DC Reborn
programme.desc: Washington, DC was built as the capital city of a new, revolutionary country, and it's home to some of America's greatest wonders; now, experts use cutting-edge engineering to reimagine what this place would look like if we had to build it again.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets at the Great Wall
programme.desc: The Great Wall of China is one of the world's greatest engineering marvels, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Doomsday in Venice
programme.desc: Venice is a city in crisis and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. As apocalyptic floodwaters unleash havoc, experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Fortress of the Gods
programme.desc: Rome's Pantheon hides the secret to the Roman Empire's power, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge engineering to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Ghosts of the Colosseum
programme.desc: Rome's Colosseum is the most famous stadium on the planet, and it took cutting-edge engineering and a fallen emperor to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Rise of the Aqueducts
programme.desc: Rome's aqueducts are one of the greatest engineering marvels in history, and it took dangerous, cutting-edge construction to build them. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building them a second time would be just as deadly.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Secrets in the Pyramid
programme.desc: Egypt's Great Pyramid is one of the world's greatest and most mysterious marvels, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest engineering innovations, experts reveal what it would take to build the ancient wonder today.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Hunt for Noah's Ark
programme.desc: According to the Bible, Noah's Ark was a world-changing engineering feat, and it took cutting-edge construction to build it. Experts use the latest tech and modern-day science to reveal if building it a second time would be just as difficult.

programme.title: If We Built It Today: Battle of Brooklyn Bridge
programme.desc: Experts use the latest technology, and modern-day science to reveal if building possibly the most important bridge in the world, New York's Brooklyn Bridge, a second time would be just as deadly as the first time.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Secrets of Mayan Murders
programme.desc: Archaeologists excavating a historic Chilean site make a chilling discovery and find decapitated human skulls separate from a nearby burial site; experts use advanced cranial forensics to reveal what really happened to these ancient, butchered victims.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: Maze of Cryptic Terror
programme.desc: A team of explorers discover a forbidding cave system riddled with ancient markings that seem to contain a mysterious meaning; using advanced photogrammetry, experts finally decode these cryptic scrawls to expose a dark chapter of English history.

programme.title: Ancient Unexplained Files: War of the Ancients
programme.desc: A gruesome archaeological discovery leads to a shocking excavation that uncovers ancient human carnage on a scale that's unparalleled; experts use 3-D bone modeling to reveal evidence of what may be the first catastrophic, major war in human history.

programme.title: American Monster: Band of Brothers
programme.desc: The Laffertys are pillars of the Mormon community, and known as a flawless example of wholesome family values, as seen in these never-before-aired home videos. But an evil is lurking that - decades later - will explode into an unholy double homicide.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Shadows of Death: Buried Dreams

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Cooking with Fire

programme.title: The Lake Erie Murders: Heartbreak Hotel

programme.title: Two Can't Keep a Secret

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Neighbors on a Dead End

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Grim Sleeper
programme.desc: A lone survivor is the only witness who can help police track down a serial killer known as the Grim Sleeper, who preys on women in South Central Los Angeles. After decades of searching, police hone in on an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: Two Can't Keep a Secret
programme.desc: When a young woman meets and marries a cop, she thinks she's set for life. But when his controlling behavior is taken a step too far, danger is not far behind.
